themes: Long wait times are widespread and risk churn — the majority of contacts have been waiting over 90 days, with many exceeding 200 days, signaling an urgent need for a scalable Product outreach and feedback process.

Multi-location reporting and daily workflow efficiency are the dominant pain points — the backlog is dominated by Managers across franchises, residential properties, and service chains who need faster, easier access to location-level data and reports.

Several high-value accounts appear multiple times — Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Avenue5 Residential, and others have multiple contacts waiting, suggesting systemic product gaps or unresolved feedback loops that require coordinated account-level attention.
